figures.caption: Base Case Age Class Distribution of Productive Forest Area (187,425 ha)
figures.review_basis: deterministic fixed-slot stacked-bar extraction; overlay contact-sheet inspection; nonnegative total-minus-THLB check; panel-total deviation recorded against the stated 187,425 ha productive forest area
figures.notes: Reviewed only for MP11 age-class planning. Panel-total deviation is 7.23%, so this is not comparison-accepted and must not be used as model input without a stronger manual review.

figures.caption: AAC Recommendation Age Class Distribution of Productive Forest Area (187,425 ha)
figures.review_basis: deterministic fixed-slot stacked-bar extraction; overlay contact-sheet inspection; nonnegative total-minus-THLB check; panel-total deviation recorded against the stated 187,425 ha productive forest area
figures.notes: Reviewed only for MP11 age-class planning. Panel-total deviation is 10.31%, so this is not comparison-accepted and must not be used as model input without a stronger manual review.
